briefs.title: BC Utilities Commission directed to pause new cryptocurrency mining electricity connection applications
briefs.summary: A December 21, 2022 provincial direction halts BC Hydro from accepting new high-voltage and large low-voltage cryptocurrency mining connection requests that lack a pre-existing facilities study agreement or design deposit.
briefs.action_required: Confirm whether your crypto mining project has a qualifying facilities study agreement or design deposit on file with BC Hydro before proceeding.

key_dates.label: BC OIC 692/2022 cryptocurrency mining connection pause takes effect
